mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_request (from_user_id, to_user_id, status, message, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{status}, #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM friend_request WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM friend_request WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
